title: Chronic Disease Knowledge Development and Exchange - Canada.ca
content:
## Chronic Disease Knowledge Development and Exchange
Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada (HPCDP)
Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada: Research, Policy and Practice is the monthly, online scientific journal of the Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention Branch of the Public Health Agency of Canada. The journal publishes articles on disease prevention, health promotion and health equity in the areas of chronic diseases, injuries and life course health. Content includes research from fields such as public/community health, epidemiology, biostatistics, the behavioural and social sciences, and health services or economics.
